category_sources: source_facts.description says Flowgrind is a TCP measurement tool similar to iperf/netperf; official README calls it an advanced TCP traffic generator.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is flowgrind; official GitHub README and GitHub Pages site use Flowgrind.
docs_sources: Official GitHub Pages site provides usage/build instructions and links to official Doxygen API documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated, so repo was intentionally not re-determined.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies TCP measurement; official site describes traffic generation, benchmarking, throughput, RTT, and distributed tests.
